REMARK: HEARING HELD 06/26/2026 ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION (CCP 1094.5(G)). MOVING PARTY FAILED TO MEET THE BURDEN OF DEMONSTRATING A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AND PROOF OF HARDSHIP. THE COURT DENIED APPLICATION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND INSTRUCTED THE MOVING PARTY TO FILE A REGULAR NOTICE MOTION. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED (302/JMQ)
